name: OLSR / B.A.T.M.A.N. (proactive)
failure_mode: Background advert traffic eats steady airtime. If a hop dies, traffic uses a stale route until the next OGM (originator message) cycle.
summary: Every node periodically advertises what it can reach. Routes are always pre-computed — no first-packet delay. Pays a constant airtime tax for that. Common on Wi-Fi mesh.
